title: MRVL Earnings Calendar and Historical Performance
text: Marvell Technology's earnings history shows consistent performance across multiple quarters. Recent earnings on March 5, 2026 for Q4 FY2026 posted EPS of $0.80, exceeding analysts' expectations of $0.71 by 12.68%. The next earnings report is expected on May 27, 2026, with analysts projecting EPS of $0.76. Looking at longer-term guidance, Q1 FY2027 revenue guidance of $2.4 billion ± 5% implies approximately 8% sequential growth at midpoint. The company raised FY2027 revenue outlook to approach $11 billion, representing more than 30% year-over-year growth compared to prior $10 billion guidance. FY2028 revenue is projected near $15 billion, representing approximately 40% year-over-year growth. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for MRVL's fiscal 2026 and 2027 earnings implies year-over-year growth of 81% and 26% respectively. For fiscal 2027 and 2028 earnings, growth of 34% and 41% is expected respectively.
